name: Poor Man's Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
Add water just enough to cover the raisins.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until raisins are tender.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
4. Stir in 1 tablespoon of baking soda with additional unbleached flour until it forms a stiff batter.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch round cake pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
7. Serve warm or cold with cream, custard sauce, or powdered sugar frosting. Optional: add walnuts to the batter just before baking.
